message:
feat(checkpoint): add Prometheus metrics for checkpoint operations

- Add metrics to checkpoint.ts:
  - flywheel_checkpoints_created_total (counter by type/trigger/compressed)
  - flywheel_checkpoint_create_duration_ms (histogram by type)
  - flywheel_checkpoint_size_bytes (histogram for compressed checkpoints)
  - flywheel_checkpoint_compression_ratio (histogram)
  - flywheel_checkpoint_restores_total (counter by type)
  - flywheel_checkpoint_restore_duration_ms (histogram by type)
  - flywheel_checkpoint_restore_errors_total (counter by error type)
  - flywheel_checkpoints_deleted_total (counter)
  - flywheel_checkpoints_pruned_total (counter)

- Add metrics to auto-checkpoint.ts:
  - flywheel_auto_checkpoint_tracked_agents (gauge)
  - flywheel_auto_checkpoint_triggers_total (counter by trigger/type)
  - flywheel_auto_checkpoint_skipped_total (counter by reason/trigger)
  - flywheel_auto_checkpoint_failures_total (counter by trigger)

Implements observability requirement from flywheel_gateway-36m acceptance criteria.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
